name: Frosted Cantaloupe Salad
recipeIngredient: 6 cups Mixed fresh fruits (e.g., bananas, apples, grapes, strawberries) cut into bite size pieces.
3/4 cup Toasted flaked coconut (or crushed almonds or pecans)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat cream cheese and milk until smooth and fluffy. Set aside.
2. Remove the rind from the cantaloupe and cut a small portion from one end so it will stand upright. Slice off two inches from the other end. Scoop out the seeds.
3. Fill the hollowed-out melon with 1 cup of fruit.
4. Frost the outside of the melon with the cheese mixture.
5. Press coconut (or crushed almonds or pecans) lightly into the cheese frosting.
6. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
7. Place the melon on a serving platter and garnish with mint leaves.
8. At the table, cut the melon into 6 wedges and place each on a salad plate with some of the fruit inside the melon. Top with remaining fruit and serve with Sesame Dressing.
